textByHash.1d8a0546dc8e36db4c8e97fab5a8efdac91b60a3: ... Wait a minute... you're that adventurer that has been taking on the Colosseum!
textByHash.39c5693c76fd80e67f36a18f42015fe5e931acc2: Wow, what are the chances you'd run into a simple farmer like me.
textByHash.cd757ab7728453707ae3a6a7397ad2b1c676d0c6: I suppose you might be needing a reliable herb supply if you're planning to continue fighting in the Colosseum?
textByHash.6e72c9605df6d6e4fe8f8e7106e9a7ca8730ea9a: I'll keep an eye on any herbs you plant here. It's the least I can do for someone like you.
textByHash.afb397c2a38a34a79ffe4f98c6ffa89481531818: It's no trouble. The soil around here is very rich, so it won't need much attention at all. I might even get a reward from the palace for helping such a valiant contender!
textByHash.0d657521cef341120c085c22e1908312af00cd3d: Best of luck on your journey, Champion!
textByHash.f5cadb2ebd123c824d51dbd1785e74de61dda77a: Best of luck on your journey, Grand Champion!
